# Navvix Limited - llms.txt

> This site belongs to Tim Norris-Wiles, a GTM operator in adtech, martech, data and AI based in London. He is currently scaling Neuralift AI, a deep learning customer segmentation platform. Previously he held senior roles at LiveRamp, Habu (acquired by LiveRamp), mParticle (acquired by Rokt), and Krux (acquired by Salesforce).

## About Tim

Tim has 20+ years of experience launching and scaling technology companies across international markets (UK, DACH, APAC, Americas). His career includes senior roles at Habu (data clean rooms, privtech, adtech — acquired by LiveRamp), mParticle (CDP, martech, customer data — acquired by Rokt), Krux (DMP, adtech, data management — acquired by Salesforce), AOL Platforms (adtech, programmatic, ad serving), and WebFusion (hosting, infrastructure — acquired by GoDaddy). His expertise spans international market entry, sales engineering, data strategy, competitive positioning, technical product marketing, and solution architecture. His network is heavily weighted toward Director to C-Suite contacts across media, retail, CPG, tech/data, sales, and engineering.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/timothynorris/
- Current company: https://neuralift.ai
- Personal site: https://www.navvix.co

## Blog

The blog contains original articles, cross-posted media appearances, podcast and video interviews, press releases, and side project write-ups spanning 2015 to present.

### Original Writing

- [Databricks State of AI Agents: Thoughts and Commentary](https://www.navvix.co/blog/databricks-state-of-ai-agents-commentary/) - Commentary on Databricks' State of AI Agents report, covering failure rates, governance, and multi-model architectures (April 2026)
- [Neuralift and the Four Layer Marketing Stack](https://www.navvix.co/blog/neuralift-and-the-four-layer-marketing-stack/) - A four-tier model for positioning Neuralift in the marketing and data stack (March 2026)
- [Apple's Next Device Isn't an AI Computer. It's an AI Router.](https://www.navvix.co/blog/apples-next-device-isnt-an-ai-computer-its-an-ai-router/) - Opinion on Apple's play to become the home AI routing layer (March 2026)
- [Designing Publisher Business Models for Humans and AI](https://www.navvix.co/blog/designing-publisher-business-models-for-humans-and-ai/) - Opinion on how publishers need parallel monetisation stacks for human and machine visitors (March 2026)
- [DungeonLift: I Built a Dungeon Crawler as a GTM Tool](https://www.navvix.co/blog/dungeonlift-a-dungeon-crawler-for-gtm/) - Building a pixel-art dungeon crawler for startup distribution and why creative GTM matters in 2026 (March 2026)
- [Following the Logic: My Path to Habu](https://www.navvix.co/blog/following-the-logic-my-path-to-habu/) - Career narrative from AOL through Krux, mParticle to Habu (June 2021)
- [What Is a Data Clean Room?](https://www.navvix.co/blog/what-is-a-data-clean-room-admonsters/) - Explainer on clean rooms for AdMonsters (February 2022)
- [Top 4 Data Clean Room Predictions for 2023](https://www.navvix.co/blog/top-4-data-clean-room-predictions-2023/) - Bylined predictions piece for The Drum (January 2023)
- [Data Clean Rooms Come of Age](https://www.navvix.co/blog/data-clean-rooms-come-of-age-pmw/) - Opinion for Performance Marketing World (January 2025)
- [Customer Data: Beyond Advertising](https://www.navvix.co/blog/customer-data-beyond-advertising/) - Why data strategy should extend beyond ads (September 2017)
- [Validity: The Fifth V of Big Data](https://www.navvix.co/blog/validity-fifth-v-big-data/) - Adding legal compliance as a dimension of big data (May 2018)

### Media & Interviews

- [AI Marketing Pioneers - New Digital Age](https://www.navvix.co/blog/ai-marketing-pioneers-new-digital-age/) - Interview on deep learning segmentation at Neuralift (January 2026)
- [Clean Rooms Will Help Data-Driven TV Into a New Era](https://www.navvix.co/blog/clean-rooms-data-driven-tv-the-media-leader/) - The Media Leader interview on CTV and clean rooms (June 2025)
- [The Hope, Hype and Reality of Data Clean Rooms](https://www.navvix.co/blog/hope-hype-reality-clean-rooms-digiday/) - Quoted in Digiday on clean room adoption gaps (August 2022)
- [SalesTechStar Interview: EMEA Expansion at Habu](https://www.navvix.co/blog/salestechstar-interview-habu/) - Q&A on EMEA strategy and clean rooms in B2B (July 2021)
- [TechRound Profile: MD EMEA at Habu](https://www.navvix.co/blog/techround-profile-habu/) - Profile piece on Habu and privacy-enhancing tech (March 2023)
- [How Adtech is Correcting Itself Post-GDPR](https://www.navvix.co/blog/adtech-correcting-post-gdpr-the-drum/) - The Drum on GDPR impact (July 2018)

### Side Projects

- [Is It A Derby? Settling the Debate With Data](https://www.navvix.co/blog/is-it-a-derby/) - A data-driven app to settle whether a football match qualifies as a derby (April 2026)
- [Building a moOde Audio Remote Display with a Raspberry Pi3](https://www.navvix.co/blog/moode-audio-remote-display/) - Now Playing display for a home audio setup (March 2026)
- [Blissify: Algorithmic Playlists for Offline Music](https://www.navvix.co/blog/blissify-algorithmic-playlists-for-offline-music/) - Bringing Spotify-like music discovery to a local FLAC collection (March 2026)
